title: Villazón Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Villazón, with a Z-Score of -3.40. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Villazón are extreme, with a significant impact on the city's daily life. 
 The cold snap has brought temperatures down, resulting in a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 12.9 GG, while the Cooling Degree Day (CDD) remains at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 34%, with moderate winds of 11.8 km/h, contributing to the harsh weather conditions.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
